name: Grünfeld Defense: Russian Variation
description: Line trainer for the Grünfeld Defense: Russian Variation, generated from the canonical opening database (lichess-org/chess-openings): 11 positions drilled book-move by book-move from Black's side across 12 named variations. Cards are introduced shallow-to-deep, shuffled across lines within each depth; the back gives the line so far, the variation name and ECO code.
